# MYZE Media — Creative Media House

Brand films, commercial content, social media video, rebrands and editorial websites
for businesses in New Jersey and New York.

## Quick Summary
- **What we do:** Video production, brand upgrades, website design — all in-house
- **Location:** New Jersey / New York metro area
- **Founder:** Mike Shishkin (visual director, cinematographer)
- **Contact:** mike@myzemedia.com
- **Awards:** PROMAX BDA, Cannes Blue Dolphin
- **Founded:** 2020

## Services
1. **Film & Content:** Commercials, brand films, product videos, interviews, campaign assets, social content. Direction, shoot, edit and color in-house.
2. **Brand Upgrade:** Visual direction, identity refinement, typography, image style, tone and content system. For brands that need to look more established.
3. **Website Upgrade:** Editorial websites and landing pages that make the business easier to trust and buy from.

## Industries Served
MedSpas & Wellness, Law Firms, Cosmetic & Dental, Fashion & Retail, Fitness & Lifestyle, Hospitality, Local Businesses, Agencies.

## How It Works
1. **Audit:** We review your video, website, social and brand presence like a first-time customer.
2. **Direction:** We define what needs to change — film only, brand direction, website, or the full system.
3. **Production:** We shoot, design and build. Everything in-house from concept to delivery.
4. **Handoff:** You leave with finished assets and a visual direction that can keep working.
